meaning: adj.(在思想、服装式样等方面)创新风的
examples: Her place in Langelinie will be occupied by three trendsetting Chinese artists and their interpretation of the sculpture.
“In every way this little group is trendsetting and unique, ” he says.
She might not have been particularly trendsetting but Betty certainly had style and a knack for fashion.
The Fab Five gained fans and detractors alike for their unabashed confidence and trendsetting style.
Technology that debuts on this sedan is trendsetting, not just for the company, but the entire industry.
